CREATE TABLE mime_messages (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, raw_message TEXT NOT NULL);

INSERT INTO mime_messages (raw_message) VALUES ('From: Somebody Mime-Version: 1.0 Content-Type: "multipart/mixed"; boundary="--the boundary" To: self@localhost This is a multipart MIME message ----the boundary Content-Type: image/gif; filename="the_big_picture.gif" GIF........ ----the boundary Content-Type: message/rfc822 From: Ford@Perfect To: vogon Mime-Version: 1.0 Content-Type: multipart/alternate; boundary="--sub-boundary" This is some Message ----sub-boundary Content-Type: text/plain Hi ----sub-boundary Content-Type: text/html

Hi

----sub-boundary-- Some garbage ----the boundary Content-Type: text/plain Some additional text ----the boundary-- Some additional garbage');
SELECT * FROM mime_messages WHERE raw_message LIKE '%multipart%' AND raw_message LIKE '%Content-Type%';
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM mime_messages WHERE raw_message LIKE '%Content-Type: message/rfc822%';
SELECT id, raw_message FROM mime_messages WHERE raw_message LIKE '%From: Somebody%' AND id IN (SELECT id FROM mime_messages WHERE raw_message LIKE '%boundary="--the boundary%');

INSERT INTO mime_messages (raw_message) VALUES ('From: Agent Mime-Version: 1.0 Content-Type: "multipart/alternative"; boundary="--abcde" ----abcde Content-Type: text/plain; charset="UTF-8" This is the plain text version. ----abcde Content-Type: text/html; charset="UTF-8" This is the HTML version. ----abcde--');
SELECT id, raw_message FROM mime_messages WHERE id NOT IN (SELECT id FROM mime_messages WHERE raw_message LIKE '%Some additional garbage%');
SELECT * FROM mime_messages WHERE EXISTS (SELECT * FROM mime_messages WHERE raw_message LIKE '%image/gif%') LIMIT 10;
DELETE FROM mime_messages WHERE raw_message LIKE '%some user removed%';
SELECT id, raw_message, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM mime_messages WHERE raw_message LIKE '%boundary%') AS boundary_count FROM mime_messages WHERE raw_message IS NOT NULL ORDER BY boundary_count DESC;
